MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNERANCE, RUTH D. HEARING SET FOR NOV-16-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, APPLICATION OF G. SEAN JEZ TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR THE PLAINTIFF RUTH MUNERANCE IS OFF CALENDAR FOR DEPARTMENT 302. PER THE REPRESENTATION OF THE MOVING PARTY ON NOVEMBER 15, 2011, THIS CASE IS SINGLY ASSIGNED TO JUDGE RICHARD KRAMER AND THUS THE MOTION NEEDS TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE KRAMER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
